ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (1 = male, 0 = female) */,
  "age_months" INTEGER /* Age of the patient in months */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Per capita household income */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level completed by the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maternity_info" (
  "maternity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the maternal record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated patient */,
  "years_of_education" INTEGER /* Years of education of the mother */,
  "preterm_birth" INTEGER /* Indicates if the birth was preterm (1 = yes, 0 = no) */,
  "pregnancy_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the pregnancy (e.g., live birth, stillbirth) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., vaginal, cesarean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maternity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maternity_info_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the health metric record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the health visit */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the patient in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the patient in cm */,
  "bp_systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "bp_diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate in beats per minute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "reason_for_visit" TEXT /* Reason for the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "chief_complaint" TEXT /* Chief complaint or presenting issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the socioeconomic status record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated patient */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the patient */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the patient */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Number of people in the patient's household */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status of the patient (e.g., owned, rented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_status_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated patient */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of health outcome (e.g., birth, illness) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date when the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the outcome (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Password reset token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, data retrieval) */,
  "login_attempt_success" INTEGER /* Indicates if the login attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., survey, administrative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_repositories" (
  "repository_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repository_name" TEXT /* Name of the data repository */,
  "repository_type" TEXT /* Type of repository (e.g., cloud, local) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repository_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal investigator */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., observational, experimental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data" (
  "project_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project data entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated research project */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to users with this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality check */,
  "check_category" TEXT /* Category of the check (e.g., completeness, consistency) */,
  "check_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the check (e.g., low, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_contacts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_provider_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-provider link */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_provider_links_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_provider_links_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data analysis */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated research project */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analyses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated research project */,
  "partner_institution" TEXT /* Name of the partner institution */,
  "partner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
